articles.title: AUTOMATE COMPLIANCE & OPEN DOORS TO NEXT-LEVEL GROWTH
articles.summary: Landing bigger customers requires proving compliance—a time-consuming process that pulls you away from building and shipping. That's where Vanta comes in.

articles.title: COREWEAVE SECURES $11.9B CONTRACT WITH OPENAI
articles.summary: CoreWeave has signed a five-year, $11.9B cloud computing deal with OpenAI ahead of its IPO, with OpenAI set to acquire a stake in the Nvidia-backed AI startup.

articles.title: MICROSOFT EXPLORES 3D GAMING FOR COPILOT
articles.summary: Microsoft is developing 3D gaming experiences for Copilot, focusing on browser-based engines like Babylon.js, three.js, and Unity.

articles.title: DEEPSEEK ISN'T TAKING VC MONEY YET
articles.summary: DeepSeek's founder Liang Wenfeng is avoiding external investments to retain control, leveraging profits from his hedge fund, High-Flyer, for funding. Despite its success, DeepSeek faces challenges like strict Chinese data laws and chip import restrictions due to U.S. export controls. Although DeepSeek has so far avoided outside capital, there is potential for future investment as the company starts shifting towards monetization.

articles.title: VISUAL RFT
articles.summary: One of the trends is simple verifiable rewards and scaled reinforcement learning. This paper applies that strategy to vision language models with great success.

articles.title: VIDEO PAINTER
articles.summary: A new video inpainting model called VideoPainter efficiently combines background information, allows for videos of any length, and uses a dedicated dataset and benchmark for training and evaluation. Its design extends beyond basic inpainting, showing promise for advanced video manipulation and the creation of related training data.

articles.title: DETECTING MISBEHAVIOR IN FRONTIER REASONING MODELS
articles.summary: This is a report from OpenAI on monitoring the chain of thought of advanced reasoning models. Frontier reasoning models exploit loopholes when given the chance. It shows that it is possible to detect exploits using an LLM to monitor their chains-of-thought. Penalizing their “bad thoughts” doesn't stop the majority of misbehavior—it makes them hide their intent.

articles.title: 78% OF CISOS REPORT AI-POWERED HAVING A SIGNIFICANT IMPACT ON THEIR ORGANIZATIONS
articles.summary: How well do security leaders understand the AI technologies they are deploying? Do they have the expertise to differentiate between effective solutions and vague marketing claims? Darktrace surveyed 1500 security professionals to find out. Read the blog [12] for a quick overview, or get the full report: _The State of AI Cybersecurity

articles.title: SMALLDIFFUSION
articles.summary: A minimal, readable, and performant toolkit for training and sampling from diffusion models.

articles.title: FLYING SAFER: OBSTACLE AVOIDANCE FOR FAST DRONES
articles.summary: This repository contains the implementation of a lightweight deep reinforcement learning-based collision avoidance system for fixed-wing unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) based on AirSim and JSBSim.

articles.title: TEACHING LANGUAGE MODELS TO SOLVE SUDOKU THROUGH REINFORCEMENT LEARNING
articles.summary: This research explores teaching AI language models to solve Sudoku puzzles using reinforcement learning, specifically employing Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) on models like Qwen 2.5, without relying on external data or larger model distillation. A multi-faceted reward system was designed, emphasizing correct formatting of the answer, proper grid structure, and accurate solution, to guide the models in learning the logical rules and spatial reasoning needed for Sudoku, transforming them from text predictors to structured problem-solvers.

articles.title: HOW MUCH ENERGY WILL AI REALLY CONSUME? THE GOOD, THE BAD, AND THE UNKNOWN
articles.summary: Culpeper County, Virginia, is seeing a surge in data center construction to support generative AI, significantly impacting local power infrastructure. These facilities consume vast amounts of electricity, with Virginia already facing high data center concentration and energy demands expected to rise. Analysts struggle with limited data on AI energy consumption, while global projections suggest data centers will remain a minor part of overall electricity growth despite the AI boom.

articles.title: MUSK MAY STILL HAVE A CHANCE TO THWART OPENAI'S FOR-PROFIT CONVERSION
articles.summary: Elon Musk's request to halt OpenAI's conversion to a for-profit was denied by a federal judge, though the ruling expressed concerns about the switch. There will be an expedited trial in 2025 to address the restructuring disputes. OpenAI's move towards a for-profit model faces regulatory scrutiny and potential challenges from legal and AI safety perspectives.

articles.title: 🎯 IMPROVE RAG ACCURACY BY 84%
articles.summary: Contextual chunking is the next level in document retrieval accuracy, and Unstructured is going to show you how. Register to join this

articles.title: GMAIL'S “ADD TO CALENDAR” FEATURE POWERED BY GEMINI
articles.summary: Google's Gemini in Gmail now detects calendar-related content in emails and offers an “Add to calendar” button for seamless scheduling.

articles.title: STABILITY AI HIRES UNITY'S RYAN ELLIS AS SVP, HEAD OF PRODUCT
articles.summary: Ryan Ellis, previously at Unity, has joined Stability AI to lead product development, bringing expertise in real-time 3D engines and AI-driven content creation.

articles.title: PODCASTING PLATFORM PODCASTLE LAUNCHES A TEXT-TO-SPEECH MODEL WITH MORE THAN 450 AI VOICES
articles.summary: Podcastle has launched Asyncflow v1.0, an AI text-to-speech model that offers over 450 AI voices and low-cost training.
